overall.description: A cinematic exploration of a medieval stone castle courtyard at golden hour, rendered in a game engine. The camera walks through the cobblestone space, circling a central ornate fountain and passing under stone arches, with warm orange lighting casting long shadows across the historic architecture.

agents.ego_description: walking forward into the courtyard through the stone archway, approaching the central fountain structure

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the entrance to the courtyard with heavy masonry blocks
circular tiered stone fountain with ornate ironwork cage structure on top
thick cylindrical stone support columns with rounded tops
red fabric banners hanging from upper walls of the castle
large rectangular wooden planters containing green shrubs

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a medieval stone courtyard through a grand archway at golden hour. The central fountain with its distinctive iron cage dominates the view ahead, while stone columns and wooden planters line the cobblestone path. Warm orange light filters through the arches, casting long shadows across the historic stonework.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard perimeter path with planters and wooden ramp

events.description: begins turning left to circle around the fountain perimeter along the courtyard wall

agents.ego_description: circling left around the courtyard perimeter, passing wooden planters and a ramp structure along the stone wall

entered.detail: wooden ramp or staircase leaning against the stone wall for access
low curved stone bench seating along the courtyard wall
lit wall-mounted lantern casting warm yellow light
round wooden barrels stacked against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Moving along the left perimeter of the courtyard, the camera passes wooden planters and a ramp structure against the stone wall. The central fountain recedes into the background while wall lanterns provide warm artificial lighting. The path follows the curved cobblestone edge past benches and storage barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle main entrance with large reinforced doors

events.description: turns toward the large wooden doors at the courtyard entrance, moving into the shadowed alcove

agents.ego_description: approaching the large wooden doors at the end of the courtyard, moving into the shadowed entrance alcove

entered.detail: tall arched wooden doors with metal reinforcement bands and decorative geometric patterns
deep stone archway framing the entrance doors with heavy masonry surround

segments.scene_description: The camera completes its circuit of the courtyard and turns toward the imposing wooden entrance doors. Moving into the shadowed alcove, the ornate metal-reinforced doors dominate the frame, framed by heavy stone arches. The warm lantern light illuminates the weathered wood and metalwork as the approach continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a medieval stone courtyard that transitions from an open, sun-drenched plaza to the shadowed intimacy of a grand entrance. It begins by passing through a grand archway at golden hour, where warm orange light filters across cobblestones toward a central fountain enclosed in an iron cage. As the camera glides along the left perimeter, the fountain recedes into the background while the view shifts toward wooden planters, storage barrels, and wall lanterns that cast a soft glow against the stone walls. The scene then completes its circuit of the courtyard, turning away from the open space and moving into a shadowed alcove. Finally, the camera approaches the imposing wooden entrance doors, where the weathered wood and ornate metal reinforcements are illuminated by the flickering light of nearby lanterns.
